DP.420.0000:
Everyone seems to call me the Berry
Master.\f
I hand out Berries daily because
I want people to learn how wonderful\r
they are.\f
You’re deserving of one!\f
DP.420.0001:
Berries are gifts of nature.\f
I encourage you to feed Berries to
Pokémon.\f
That will make Pokémon happy.\f
Seeing that, people will be motivated
to plant more Berries.\f
And that will make Sinnoh a greener,
more natural place.
DP.420.0002:
Are you the forgetful type who
forgets where Berries are planted?
DP.420.0003:
Yes, yes, I thought so!
I’m the same way!\f
I feel a sort of kinship with you!
You can have this Pokétch app!\f
DP.420.0004:
Oh, is that so.\f
Then you’re OK even if I don’t give
you this nice thing.
DP.420.0005:
The [0118,0000] shows you
where there are ripe Berries\r
that are ready to be picked.
DP.420.0006:
Certain kinds of Berries need lots
and lots of water.
DP.420.0007:
Um... Would you like some Mulch?\f
If you’re going to grow Berries,
Mulch is a good fertilizer.
DP.420.0008:
That [0108,0000]...\f
I made it by mixing high-grade soil
with Pokémon...um...you know...\f
It will promote healthy Berry growth.
DP.420.0011:
I’m so sorry...
Your Bag appears to be full...
DP.420.0012:
Um... You don’t appear to have
enough money...
